spec_match.rationale: The page exercises the exact feature surface or its documented replacement/fallback rather than an unrelated baseline API.

interactive.rationale: The concept exposes real controls and updates rendered output or API state.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The concept is a distinct use case under the ChromeStatus listing summary.

edge_cases.rationale: The primary and fallback paths are present; this inherited route was not exhaustively re-reviewed for every visual edge case.

conformance.rationale: The v152 feature-level suite encodes the matching spec contract and was created without editing any existing suite.

runtime_evidence.rationale: Fresh Chrome DevTools MCP control sweep loaded the v152 route, exercised every detected control, found accessible names, and reported no runtime/action failure; this inherited concept did not receive a new per-state full-page visual review in this batch.

telemetry_health.rationale: Automatic telemetry is loaded, but this inherited page has no page-authored assertion for its primary contract.

design_system.rationale: The page uses the shared showcase shell and design-system variables with readable code/status surfaces.

accessibility.rationale: The fresh sweep found all detected controls programmatically named; controls use native semantics and changing output is exposed as text/live status.

openQuestions.title: Add explicit runtime assertions
openQuestions.detail: Add showcaseTelemetry assertions for the primary native or fallback contract so deployed telemetry distinguishes successful feature use from unsupported state.

openQuestions.title: Capture a fresh visual state set
openQuestions.detail: Capture and inspect desktop initial/post-interaction and narrow screenshots for this inherited v152 route; the automated control pass does not replace deliberate geometry review.

summary: Chrome DevTools MCP exercised the v152 streaming-html controls with clean post-triage runtime results. Inherited visual evidence remains a minor follow-up rather than being silently claimed.
